description: A container for a single key metric or a grouped set of related information.
use_when: Displaying a single important numeric value (KPI), a summary, or a small group of related details.

expects.title: string (required) - The label of the metric
expects.value: string/number (required) - The main value to display
expects.icon: string (optional) - Name of a Lucide icon to display

description: A responsive data grid for displaying lists of records.
use_when: Displaying a list of records with multiple attributes, search results, or detailed logs.

expects.columns: array of objects (required) - Definitions for each column {Header: string, accessor: string}
expects.data: array of objects (required) - The actual data records matching the column accessors
expects.caption: string (optional) - A specific caption for the table

use_when: Visualizing a percentage, completion rate, or a value within a fixed range (0-100).

expects.label: string (optional) - Label describing what is being measured

description: A small chip to display status, category, or count.
use_when: Highlighting a status (Active/Inactive), a category tag, or a short labeled attribute.
Separating distinct sections or groups of content within a layout.
Data is fetching or processing to minimize layout shift.

expects.className: string (optional) - CSS classes for width and height (e.g., 'h-4 w-[250px]')
